channel.title: Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Activator.CreateInstance vs Compiled Expressions in C#: .NET 10 Performance Deep Dive
item.description: Activator.CreateInstance vs compiled expressions in C# .NET 10 -- understand when each wins and how to build a high-performance factory with cached delegates. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/22/activatorcreateinstance-vs-compiled-expressions-in-c-net-10-performance-deep-dive

item.title: How to Implement Template Method Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement the template method pattern in C# with step-by-step examples covering abstract classes, hooks, sealed methods, and DI integration. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/22/how-to-implement-template-method-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide

item.title: Reflection Performance in .NET 10: Benchmarks, Caching, and Delegates
item.description: Understand C# reflection performance in .NET 10 -- learn caching strategies, compiled delegates, FrozenDictionary, and when reflection is fast enough. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/21/reflection-performance-in-net-10-benchmarks-caching-and-delegates

item.title: Proxy vs Decorator Pattern in C#: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Compare proxy vs decorator pattern in C# with side-by-side code examples, structural similarities, intent differences, and guidance on when to use each. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/21/proxy-vs-decorator-pattern-in-c-key-differences-explained

item.title: PropertyInfo and MethodInfo in C#: The Practical Developer's Guide
item.description: Learn to use PropertyInfo and MethodInfo in C# to read and write properties, invoke methods, and inspect types at runtime with practical .NET 10 examples. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/20/propertyinfo-and-methodinfo-in-c-the-practical-developers-guide

item.title: Template Method Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Master the template method design pattern in C# with practical examples showing inheritance-based algorithm customization and real-world .NET implementations. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/20/template-method-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples

item.title: C# Reflection Anti-Patterns: 8 Mistakes That Will Hurt Your App
item.description: Avoid costly C# reflection anti-patterns -- learn 8 common mistakes developers make with reflection and the .NET 10 alternatives that perform better. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/19/c-reflection-antipatterns-8-mistakes-that-will-hurt-your-app

item.title: Proxy Pattern Best Practices in C#: Code Organization and Maintainability
item.description: Master proxy pattern best practices in C# including interface compliance, thread safety, DI integration, testability, and avoiding common anti-patterns. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/19/proxy-pattern-best-practices-in-c-code-organization-and-maintainability

item.title: C# Reflection: The Complete .NET 10 Guide
item.description: Master C# reflection in .NET 10 -- learn Type, PropertyInfo, MethodInfo, performance caching with FrozenDictionary, and when to avoid reflection entirely. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/18/c-reflection-the-complete-net-10-guide

item.title: Flyweight Pattern Real-World Example in C#: Complete Implementation
item.description: Build a production-ready flyweight pattern example in C# with a document rendering system that shares font and style data across thousands of text elements. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/18/flyweight-pattern-realworld-example-in-c-complete-implementation

item.title: New LINQ Methods in .NET 6-10: Chunk, MinBy, CountBy, Index, LeftJoin, and More
item.description: New LINQ methods in .NET 6-10: Chunk, DistinctBy, MinBy, CountBy, Index, LeftJoin and more -- every addition with before/after C# code examples. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/17/new-linq-methods-in-net-610-chunk-minby-countby-index-leftjoin-and-more

item.title: When Reddit Says Quit Your Manager - Dev Leader Weekly 140
item.description: Welcome to another issue of Dev Leader Weekly! In this issue, I discuss the Reddit thread telling someone to quit their bad manager -- and why I push back on the all-or-nothing framing, plus what to actually try first. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/17/when-reddit-says-quit-your-manager-dev-leader-weekly-140

item.title: When to Use Proxy Pattern in C#: Decision Guide with Examples
item.description: Discover when to use proxy pattern in C# with decision criteria for virtual, protection, and caching proxies plus guidance on simpler alternatives. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/17/when-to-use-proxy-pattern-in-c-decision-guide-with-examples

item.title: Weekly Recap: LINQ in C#, Design Patterns, and AI in Software Engineering [May 2026]
item.description: This week takes a deep tour of LINQ in C# covering grouping, aggregation, set operations, joins, deferred execution, and element access, plus complete guides to the proxy, flyweight, and bridge design patterns. The video lineup tackles context switching, generational dynamics on engineering teams, and where AI tooling actually fits in a real developer workflow. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/17/weekly-recap-linq-in-c-design-patterns-and-ai-in-software-engineering-may-2026

item.title: LINQ Element Access in C#: First, Last, Single, Chunk, and TryGetNonEnumeratedCount
item.description: Master LINQ element access in C# -- First, Last, Single, Chunk, and TryGetNonEnumeratedCount for safer, faster .NET 6+ collection queries. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/16/linq-element-access-in-c-first-last-single-chunk-and-trygetnonenumeratedcount

item.title: Flyweight vs Singleton Pattern in C#: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Compare flyweight vs singleton pattern in C# with side-by-side code examples, key structural differences, and guidance on when to use each for instance management. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/16/flyweight-vs-singleton-pattern-in-c-key-differences-explained

item.title: LINQ Deferred Execution in C#: When Queries Execute and Multiple Enumeration Pitfalls
item.description: Understand LINQ deferred execution in C# -- when queries actually run, multiple enumeration bugs, and when to materialize with ToList for correctness. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/15/linq-deferred-execution-in-c-when-queries-execute-and-multiple-enumeration-pitfalls

item.title: How to Implement Proxy Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement the proxy pattern in C# with step-by-step examples covering virtual proxies, protection proxies, and DI registration. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/15/how-to-implement-proxy-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide
